div.p: FOUR LOOPS · TYPESTATE POLICY GATE · BRAINCTL MEMORY · XAI GROK REASONING

g.title: src/orchestrator.ts — in-process intervals (dev) · BullMQ per loop (prod)
OAuth 2.0 PKCE · Basic tier 10k posts/mo · no follow endpoint · refresh tokens rotate every call

div.p: WRITES POST /2/TWEETS (NO IDEMPOTENCY HEADER) POST /2/USERS/:ID/LIKES POST /2/DM_CONVERSATIONS/WITH/:ID/MESSAGES

g.title: grok-4.20-reasoning · grok-4-1-fast-non-reasoning · refusal tax 0.05 USD/req (pre-filter locally)

div.p: POST /V1/RESPONSES · SYNC REASONING POST /V1/FILES · JSONL UPLOAD POST /V1/BATCHES · ASYNC · 50% OFF
MAX_TURNS: 5 PROMPT_CACHE_KEY PER LOOP+TENANT INCLUDE: [MCP_CALL_OUTPUT, REASONING.ENC, X_SEARCH.SOURCES]

g.title: Dual surface: remote MCP (HTTP/SSE) for Grok with READ allowlist · local stdio MCP for TS-direct writes

div.p: READ ALLOWLIST (GROK) MEMORY_SEARCH · ENTITY_GET · ENTITY_SEARCH CONTEXT_SEARCH · TOM_PERSPECTIVE_GET POLICY_MATCH · REASON · TEMPORAL_*
+ CONSOLIDATOR WRITES REFLEXION_WRITE · DREAM_CYCLE CONSOLIDATION_RUN · GAPS_SCAN RETIREMENT_ANALYSIS
NEVER EXPOSED MEMORY_ADD · ENTITY_CREATE · EVENT_ADD BELIEF_SET · POLICY_ADD · TRUST_* · BACKUP
EVERY 120 S SRC/LOOPS/PERCEIVER.TS
• OWN MENTIONS (SINCEID) • HOME TIMELINE • DM EVENTS • NO EXTERNAL SCOUTING (GROK OWNS X_SEARCH)
EVERY 300 S · GROK-4.20-REASONING SRC/LOOPS/REASONER.TS
READS LAST 50 PERCEIVED_EVENTS EMITS UP TO 10 CANDIDATEENVELOPE[]
PROMPTCACHEKEY: STRAND:REASONER:V1 MAXTURNS: 5 · PARALLELTOOLCALLS TOOLS: X_SEARCH · WEB_SEARCH · BRAINCTL MCP SCHEMA: ANYOF PER ACTION.KIND
STUCK-MID-THOUGHT → RETRY WITH PREVIOUS_RESPONSE_ID
1 BANNED_TOPIC 2 PREFILTER (REGEX+TOPIC+EMBEDDING) 3 RATE CAPS (DAY + HOUR) 4 COOLDOWNS (PER-TARGET) 5 RELEVANCE ≥ 0.65 6 DUP COS < 0.85 (7D) 7 DIVERSITY (CLUSTER + KIND) 8 DM MUTUAL REQUIRED
MINTS CANDIDATE<"APPROVED"> (ACTOR SIGNATURE REJECTS ANYTHING ELSE)
EVENT-DRIVEN · SHADOW/GATED/LIVE SRC/LOOPS/ACTOR.TS
ACCEPTS ONLY CANDIDATE<"APPROVED">

ol.li: SHA-256 IDEMPOTENCY NORMALIZE(TEXT) + REPLY_TO + QUOTE_ID + MEDIA
DISPATCH PER ACTION.KIND LIKE · BOOKMARK · POST · REPLY · QUOTE · DM FOLLOW/UNFOLLOW (PRO GATED)

div.p: XAI BATCH API · 50% OFF
JSONL: DREAM_CYCLE · CONSOLIDATION_RUN GAPS_SCAN · RETIREMENT_ANALYSIS REFLEXION_WRITE
GROKFILESUPLOAD → GROKBATCHCREATE → CONSOLIDATOR_RUNS STATUS=QUEUED POLL → AGGREGATE SUMMARY_JSON
SRC/DB/SCHEMA.SQL
ACTION_LOG IDEMPOTENCY_KEY UK COOLDOWNS · RATE_COUNTERS REASONER_RUNS · CONSOLIDATOR_RUNS POST_EMBEDDINGS (7D DUP WINDOW) PERCEIVED_EVENTS · DLQ HUMAN_REVIEW_QUEUE

• TYPESTATE GATE • REASONER SCHEMA + CACHE KEY + CHAINING • CONSOLIDATOR BATCH SUBMIT + POLL HELPERS • BRAINCTL R/W SURFACE • PREFILTER (REGEX + TOPIC + EMBEDDING) • GROKCOMPOSE LIBRARY • REPLAY-SHADOW REGRESSION TOOL • 84 TESTS GREEN · SMOKE 254 MS

• WIRE CONSOLIDATORPOLL INTO ORCHESTRATOR • PHASE 3: 48 H PERCEIVER ON REAL X CREDS • LABEL 100 CANDIDATES • ≥ 80% SHADOW AGREEMENT • PHASE 4+: COMPOSER OPT-IN (TWO-STAGE) • PHASE 7: PRO TIER → FOLLOW VARIANT LIVE
• DMS TO NON-MUTUALS • ACTION BYPASSING THE POLICY GATE • BRAINCTL MUTATIONS VIA GROK MCP • PROMPTS AS INLINE STRINGS • DEFERRED COMPLETIONS FOR CONSOLIDATOR • FOLLOW VARIANT ON BASIC TIER
